title: Random Colored Creeper
body:
Texture Pack for 1.13+ - Optifine Required

This texture pack add multiple color variation for Creeper texture...

How it work?

Simple, you install the texture pack (ignore the warning if you using the 1.13+ version) then go on your game, creeper will be randomly colored.
It's only cosmetic, color of a creeper don't affect it. Optifine is required with random texture ON
